title: Noida Workers’ Protest Explodes Into Fresh Violence: Stone-Pelting, Tear Gas in Sector 70, Sector 80
description: Fresh clashes in Noida have intensified the ongoing workers’ protest, with violence reported in Sector 70, Sector 80, Phase 2, Sector 84, and Sector 62. Protestors hurled stones, vandalized police vehicles, and attacked a bus carrying officers, forcing police to fire tear gas. Several personnel were injured as reinforcements, including the PAC, were deployed. The unrest follows Monday’s escalation in Phase 2 and Sector 84, where vehicles were set ablaze and traffic snarls crippled the city. Work
